title: Loctite Epoxy 1min 11ml
features: FAST – The all purpose adhesive provides a powerful initial strength to bond a range of materials with long-lasting effects both indoors and outdoors.
BRUTAL – The fast-setting bonding glue ensures strong bonds on both flexible and rigid materials and can even be used for challenging materials such as leather.
PERSISTENT – The versatile, fast setting glue also promises high-quality bonding under challenging conditions, reaching its final strength after 24 hours.
Multi-material – This strong adhesive performs well on most materials such as wood, metal, glass, textiles or plastics* and can be used on large surfaces.
All Purpose Glue, high-quality clear liquid glue for a range of needs and materials including wood, metal, stone, glass and plastics*, transparent
description: Product Description Smooth surfaces and fill gaps fast with the high-strength epoxy resin. use the powerful glue to bond smooth surfaces and uneven gaps, with the instant mix syringe for automatic mixing. with a cure speed of just 1 minute, the durable instant glue ensures even the most challenging of jobs are completed on time. the glue ensures strong bonds on flexible and rigid materials including wood, metal, porcelain, stone, concrete, glass, leather, plastics* and even polystyrene. the epoxy adhesive promises high-quality and long-lasting adhesion, enduring both indoor and outdoor environments with a weather- and water-resistant final bond. Directions Easy to use with the instant mix syringe allowing tough jobs to be completed in time
